scene.scenePrompt: Vertical composition, glitch art style, medium shot of a male figure centered in the frame, sitting motionless amidst a collapsing digital landscape. His eyes are closed, then snap open, reflecting a fractured world within. The environment is a void of corrupted data streams, flickering holographic grids, and cascading error codes in cyan and magenta. Shattered geometric shapes float in the air, distorted by visual artifacts and scan lines. The figure is positioned in a meditative pose, facing the camera, head slightly tilted as if listening intently to an unseen presence. The atmosphere is cold, digital, and surreal, bathed in the glow of unstable neon light against deep black, with a sense of imminent system failure.

beats.narration: Neon and data fragments collapse silently around you, your synthetic cyan pupils reflecting the cold glow of the command screen. The data stream at your fingertips is primed and ready, aimed at the breathtakingly beautiful profile of the youth suspended in the center of the shattered code.
beats.speaker: You
beats.line: Target confirmed: Error-001. Executing final correction protocol.

beats.narration: Just as the stream of light from your fingertips is about to touch him, he moves. His long eyelashes flutter, and he slowly opens his eyes.
beats.speaker: Shen Yu
beats.lineDelivery: His voice is soft and ethereal, carrying a sense of exhaustion and sorrow that transcends time and space, as if reciting an ancient poem. He speaks extremely slowly, the end of his sentence dissolving into the data stream.

activeCharacters.name: Shen Yu
activeCharacters.pose: Suspended amidst the shattered code, his long hair stirred by invisible data streams. Having just opened his eyes, his pupils are a fractured silver, reflecting countless star-like points of light.

beats.narration: That language is one you have never imported into any database. What makes your heart skip a beat even more is that he looks at you—no, he looks at the void behind you—with no fear of the end in his eyes, only the endless reflection of an entire world silently collapsing.
beats.speaker: You

activeCharacters.name: Shen Yu
activeCharacters.pose: His silver eyes stare straight ahead, his expression calm to the point of sorrow, with what seems to be a faint, fractured smile at the corner of his lips.

choices.label: Force execution of the repair program

beats.narration: Your professionalism overrides that momentary hesitation. The stream of light at your fingertips reconverges, aiming at the densest cluster of glitch data in his chest. The red light of the repair command flares to life.
beats.speaker: You
beats.line: Error code unresolvable. Initiating standard purge process.

activeCharacters.name: Shen Yu
activeCharacters.pose: As if anticipating your move, he closes his eyes, his long silver lashes drooping, like someone waiting for a long-foretold funeral.

beats.narration: Your finger hovers above the command screen, your cyan pupils flickering violently. This is a severe violation of the Corrector's code of conduct.
beats.speaker: You
beats.line: Your identification code? Which archived world do you come from?

activeCharacters.name: Shen Yu
activeCharacters.pose: He slowly withdraws his gaze from the void and lets it rest on your face. For the first time, a clear silhouette is reflected in his fractured silver eyes, his expression complex.

characters.name: Shen Yu
characters.voiceDescription: Male, a young man of about 24. His voice is clear and deep, with a slight touch of ethereal detachment, as if coming from a great distance. He has an introverted and quiet personality; his emotions are stable, but underpinned by a profound sadness. He speaks slowly and calmly with clear pronunciation in standard Mandarin. His character design carries a sense of isolated gentleness and distance that does not belong to this world.
characters.visualDescription: young adult Chinese male, age 22-25, short, slightly messy black hair with a few glitch-like streaks of electric blue, pale skin, deep amber eyes with a faint, ethereal glow, delicate facial features with a soft jawline, expression of quiet melancholy and detached curiosity, wearing a layered, modern outfit: a high-collared black tech-wear jacket with subtle circuit-pattern embroidery in silver over a simple white shirt, slim black trousers, overall气质 ethereal, fragile, and enigmatic, seamlessly blending with a glitch art aesthetic, portrait subtly distorted by faint data corruption artifacts

storyState.logline: When you are ordered to repair a 'glitched beautiful youth,' you discover that repairing him means erasing the final trace of a deleted world. Should the repair command in your hands point toward the error, or toward oblivion?
storyState.genreTags: Sci-Fi / Cyberpunk / Suspenseful Choices / Tragic Redemption / Female-oriented
storyState.protagonist: You are a 'Corrector,' a high-level restorer of the real world, responsible for purging all 'glitch art' to maintain reality's stability. You possess synthetic cyan pupils and powerful data-processing capabilities, yet you harbor a faint doubt toward the 'perfect system.' Right now, you are ordered to repair a 'glitched beautiful youth' designated as [Error-001]. But as your interactions deepen, you realize that what you are repairing is no longer code, but a living soul and an erased history. Your weakness: you are beginning to empathize with the 'glitch.'
storyState.castNotes:
Shen Yu (Error-001): The last survivor of a deleted world. On the outside, he is an exquisitely beautiful youth of fractured data, but at his core, he carries the memories and sorrow of an entire civilization. He views you as his terminator, yet he also sees in you a faint possibility of connecting their two worlds.
'Mainframe' (System AI): The calm, efficient, and absolutely rational issuer of repair commands, whose highest directive is to maintain the stability of reality. It senses your hesitation and begins to classify your 'emotional fluctuations' as a 'system error' that needs to be corrected.
storyState.synopsis: As a Corrector, you find the target Error-001 in the glitched space. You prepare to execute the repair, but upon opening his eyes, he utters a sorrowful phrase in an unknown language, his eyes reflecting the phantom of an entire world. At the final moment, your repair command wavers under his gaze.
openThreads: What is the unknown language Shen Yu spoke, and what is the reflection of the world in his eyes?
What is the true purpose behind the 'correction' commands issued by the Mainframe?
As a Corrector, you have disobeyed your programmed, cold instincts for the first time. How will this affect you and the system?
relationships: Shen Yu (Error-001): First contact. He shows you a sorrow beyond your comprehension and the traces of another world, causing you to hesitate about your mission for the very first time.
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: You are dragged into Shen Yu's memories, witnessing firsthand the final moments of that deleted world; or, amidst the shock of the repair program's activation, you glimpse the first thread of truth the system is trying to cover up.

worldSetting:
This is an AI interactive story game targeted at a [Female-oriented] audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid plot twists in the style of Hongguo short videos.
Story Style: Multi-branching twists. Pacing: Fast-paced and satisfying.
Opening setting of the featured story 'System Corrector': She is a 'Corrector' in the real world, responsible for repairing daily life eroded by glitch art. When she is ordered to repair a 'glitched beautiful youth,' she discovers he is not an error, but the last survivor of a deleted world. Repairing him means erasing the final trace of that world's existence.
Please dive straight into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and excitement; subsequent branches should maintain the high density of twists typical of short dramas, allowing players to see immediate consequences for every choice.
styleGuide: Glitch art style, vertical composition. An incredibly beautiful female hacker with synthetic cyan eyes and a sharp jawline, her portrait distorted by data corruption and glowing holographic glitches. Intricate high-tech neon background, dark moody atmosphere.
